name: employee-management-system
description: Modern CRUD Employee Management System with Next.js and Fastify

scripts.dev: node scripts/banner.js && cd backend && yarn db:generate >nul 2>&1 && yarn db:push >nul 2>&1 && yarn db:seed && cd .. && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --raw "cd backend && yarn dev" "cd frontend && yarn dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && yarn build && cd ../frontend && yarn build
scripts.start: cd backend && yarn start & cd frontend && yarn start
scripts.test: cd backend && yarn test && cd ../frontend && yarn test
scripts.lint: cd backend && yarn lint && cd ../frontend && yarn lint
scripts.format: cd backend && yarn format && cd ../frontend && yarn format
scripts.clean: cd backend && yarn clean && cd ../frontend && yarn clean
scripts.setup: yarn install && cd backend && yarn install && cd ../frontend && yarn install
scripts.db:setup: cd backend && yarn db:generate && yarn db:push && yarn db:seed
